description_long: This is a young adult male dressed in layered urban outerwear, featuring a padded jacket with broad shoulder pads and a high collar, worn over a fitted shirt. The jacket has visible seams, patches, and a geometric emblem on the back, suggesting a modern or slightly futuristic style. He wears slim, reinforced pants with knee pads and utility pockets, paired with sturdy, high-ankle boots. His hands are gloveless, and his stance is alert, with arms slightly bent and feet apart, as if ready to move. The face is clean-shaven with a determined expression, and the hair is styled in a neat, side-parted cut. Accessories include a belt with a pouch and a small device attached to the hip, enhancing the utilitarian look.
description: A young adult male in layered, padded urban outerwear with reinforced pants and high-ankle boots, standing alert with a modern, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded jacket, high collar, fitted shirt, and facial features with a determined expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the jacket's shoulder pad, arm details, and the profile of the boots and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the geometric emblem on the back of the jacket, the belt, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite shoulder pad, arm details, and the side profile of the pants and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: padded urban jacket with shoulder pads, fitted shirt, reinforced slim pants, utility belt, and high-ankle boots
